items.title: EcoFlow brings back Prime Day power station pricing in sale from $169, Segway Xafari e-bike $1,550 low, EGO Multi-Head, more
items.summary:
We’re closing out this week’s Green Deals with an EV-heavy edition, though our headliner is EcoFlow’s second phase Outdoor Season Sale with returning Prime Day Pricing on power stations + multiple FREE gift tiers – all starting from $169. Right behind that, we have Segway’s Xafari All-Terrain Fat Tire Smart Cruiser e-bike at its $1,550 low, the EGO Multi-Head bundle for a Power Head, 15-inch String Trimmer attachment, and a 5.0Ah battery back at $319, and Gotrax’s budget-friendly R7 Electric Bike at its $765 low. That’s not all, as you can also find Navee’s XT5 Pro Off-road e-scooter at its second-lowest price, the compact 24V 12-inch Greenworks chainsaw bundle, and more. As always, you can find all the hangover deals from this week down at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s $1,000 2026 low on the Segway Max G3 e-scooter that ends tomorrow night, the soon-to-end EcoFlow dual power station bundle flash sale offers, and more. 
Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

items.title: Segway Xaber review: The mall-cop company just built a better Sur Ron for less money
items.summary:
When you think of Segway, you might still think of the self-balancing personal transporters that mall cops and tour groups employ to get around. The company, however, since being acquired by Beijing-based Ninebot a decade ago, has morphed into E-bikes, e-scooters, go-karts, off-road UTVs — the company has been stacking up two- and four-wheeled hardware for a while now. But with the recent launch of the new Xaber, however, they are now into very serious 60+mph-capable electric off-road motorcycles.
We’ve spent the last month with the Xaber and, after dining on a bunch of bargain emotos, the Segway Ninebot Xaber almost seems to be in a class by itself…
items.translatedTitle: 赛格威Xaber评论：这家商场警察公司刚刚用更少的钱建造了一个更好的Sur Ron

items.title: Western Europe sees strong irradiance gains during record June heat
items.summary:
In a new weekly update for pv magazine, Solcast, a DNV company, reports that record June heat was accompanied by a stark north–south split in Europe's solar resource, with persistent high pressure boosting irradiance by up to 25% across western and southern Europe while Atlantic weather systems reduced irradiance by as much as 25% across Scandinavia, the UK and Ireland. The observed pattern broadly matched seasonal forecasts but with stronger-than-expected regional contrasts, highlighting exceptional solar gains in France, northern Spain and northern Italy alongside significant deficits in northern Europe.
The post Western Europe sees strong irradiance gains during record June heat appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 西欧在创纪录的6月高温期间看到强劲的辐照度上升

items.summary: US solar PV mounting systems manufacturer Unirac has acquired the solar racking business of Terrasmart from its parent company Gibraltar Industries, expanding its product portfolio into the commercial and industrial (C&I) and distributed generation (DG) segments.
items.translatedTitle: Unirac收购Terrasmart太阳能货架业务

items.title: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
items.translatedTitle: 人工智能时代的记分卡

items.title: Waaree, India’s biggest PV module supplier, opens 5.15GWh battery storage assembly plant
items.summary: A subsidiary of Indian renewable energy equipment and component manufacturer Waaree Energies has opened a battery energy storage system (BESS) enclosure factory.
items.translatedTitle: 印度最大光伏组件供应商Waaree开设5.15 GWh电池储能装配厂

items.title: Tongwei claims record-breaking 93.07% bifaciality factor for 770 W solar module
items.summary:
The result, which represents a world record for the bifacial technology, was verified by German certification body TÜV Rheinland. 
The post Tongwei claims record-breaking 93.07% bifaciality factor for 770 W solar module appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 通威声称770W太阳能电池组件的双面性系数达到创纪录的93.07%

items.title: Bluetti features new Balco Series line of products at The smarter E 2026
items.summary:
At The smarter E 2026, the company highlighted its new balcony energy storage solutions that enable homeowners to optimize self-consumption of solar. Henrik Zhai, Bluetti’s Head of Sales for the DACH region, demonstrated the plug-and-play aspects of the company’s smart meter accessories.
The post Bluetti features new Balco Series line of products at The smarter E 2026 appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: Bluetti在SMARTER E 2026上推出全新Balco系列产品

items.title: Suntech: Building Trust Through 25 Years of Solar Innovation
items.summary: At Intersolar 2026, PV Tech sat down with Suntech's General Manager Mr. Yang Hao to discuss how a quarter-century of experience, combined with robust industrial backing, positions the company for the industry's next chapter.
items.translatedTitle: 尚德：通过25年的太阳能创新建立信任

items.title: PJM’s old way of getting power built isn’t working. Has it found a fix?
items.summary: With the conclusion of its latest capacity auction, PJM Interconnection has once again shown that its process for securing new energy is unable to keep up with the wave of electricity demand from data centers.  But PJM, the grid operator for the country’s biggest energy market, is poised to adopt a new process that…
items.translatedTitle: PJM建立电力的旧方法不起作用。找到解决办法了吗？

items.title: Nuclear energy could be in for a big decade
items.summary: This article is part of our  ​“Chart of the Week” series  .   The global nuclear energy industry has been muted since 2011, when the Fukushima Daiichi disaster unfolded in Japan. Some new reactors have been built — especially in China — but a lot of old nuclear power plants have been retired as well.  That means…
items.translatedTitle: 核能可能会持续很长时间

items.title: Chip Industry Week In Review
items.summary:
Intel's expansion; Cadence AI super agent for PCB, advanced packaging; photonics fab wars; earlier Yongin fab; German funding; new CHIPS Act award; HBM standard; Quadric funding; AMS acquisition; earnings; Rapidus teams up.
The post Chip Industry Week In Review appeared first on Semiconductor Engineering.
